title: Briefings
description: A requested research report on a topic (optionally scoped to a collection), assembled by the analyst agent from cited sources.

title.description: the briefing headline shown in the briefings list

topic.description: the topic or question the briefing addresses

body.description: the full assembled briefing report, markdown

status.description: 'pending' while queued for the analyst, 'ready' when complete, 'error' on failure

collectionId.description: the collection this briefing is scoped to, if requested from a collection view

sourceCount.description: how many sources the analyst drew on to write this briefing

collection.description: the collection this briefing is scoped to, if any
